data.title: Cardano’s ADA Zooms Above $1 as Bitcoin Remains Rangebound
data.description:
• Cardano’s ADA jumped 12% in the past 24 hours to lead gains among crypto majors, with rangebound trading in bitcoin (BTC) influencing the broader market.
  • Price-chart analysis suggests further gains of as much as 30% for the token ahead.

data.title: Beware of Bitcoin's 'Shooting Star' Warning at Record Highs: Godbole
data.description:
• BTC carved out a shooting star candle in December, hinting at renewed bearishness.
  • December's low is the level to defend for the bulls.
  • The pattern is consistent with macro developments that suggest short-term pain for risk assets.

data.title: BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF Records Its Largest Outflow
data.description:
• Data shows that BlackRock’s IBIT, which holds over $53 billion in net assets, saw over $332 million leave the fund.
  • Thursday's tally exceeds the short-held previous record outflow of $188 million in late December.

data.title: Northern Data Is Well Positioned to Take Advantage of the AI Boom: Canaccord
data.description:
• Canaccord initiated coverage of Northern Data with a buy rating and 60 euro ($62) price target.
  • Northern Data is well positioned to take advantage of the growing artificial intelligence compute cycle, the report said.
  • A potential sale of the firm's Peak Mining business could unlock significant value for the company, the broker said.

data.title: Dollar's Post-Election Path Is Tracking Trump's First Presidential Term: Van Straten
data.description:
• The dollar and bitcoin both surged after November's U.S. presidential election.
  • The dollar's rally matched that following President-elect Donald Trump's previous victory, in 2016.
  • Continued strength in the currency, which is likely given Trump's policies and the Fed's expected interest-rate stance, may weigh on bitcoin in the months ahead.

data.title: Tether's Market Value Sees Sharpest Decline Since FTX Crash as MiCA Kicks In
data.description:
• The market cap of Tether's USDT slid almost 1.1% this week.
  • Several European exchanges and Coinbase have removed USDT on MiCA compliance concerns.
  • The delisting has a limited impact on USDT's dominance and the broader market.

data.title: Kucoin Enables Crypto Point-of-Sale Payments by QR-Code
data.description:
• KuCoin has introduced a point-of-sale system that allows customers to pay merchants using crypto held in their accounts at the exchange.
  • KuCoin Pay allows 54 cryptocurrencies, including bitcoin, ether, USDT and USDC.

data.title: XRP Rockets 11% as Bitcoin Starts New Year With Bullish Bang
data.description:
• XRP surged 11% to lead growth among majors as of Thursday, led by $1.3 billion worth of trading volumes on Korea-focused exchange Upbit.
  • A CoinDesk analysis from Tuesday flagged unusually high trading volumes for XRP stemming from South Korean exchanges, which has historically acted as a harbinger for price volatility with a bias to the upside.
  • Firms target a $185,000 level for bitcoin and $5,500 for ether (ETH) in a widely-anticipated bullish year for the industry.

data.title: Bitcoin-Leveraged Play MicroStrategy's Bullish Call Skew Disappears in Cautious Market Sentiment
data.description:
• MSTR's record call skew disappears in a sign of renewed cautious sentiment.
  • The share price is now down 44% from the record high.
  • BTC's bullish treasury asset narrative, a major tailwind in 2024, is losing momentum, according to one observer.

data.title: Garanti BBVA’s to Provide Crypto Trading Services in Hint of Things to Come
data.description:
• Customers of Garanti BBVA Kripto will soon be able to buy and sell cryptocurrencies.
  • Bit2Me, the crypto exchange used for trading execution, says that many European banks are edging to offer the same kind of product to their customers in the EU.
  • The Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation came in full effect on Dec. 30.
